tools.name: accounts.admobAccountsAdUnitsList
tools.description: List the ad units under the specified AdMob account.

tools.name: accounts.admobAccountsAppsList
tools.description: List the apps under the specified AdMob account.

tools.name: accounts.admobAccountsGet
tools.description: Gets information about the specified AdMob publisher account.

tools.name: accounts.admobAccountsList
tools.description: Lists the AdMob publisher account that was most recently signed in to from the AdMob UI. For more information, see https://support.google.com/admob/answer/10243672.

tools.name: accounts.admobAccountsMediationReportGenerate
tools.description: Generates an AdMob mediation report based on the provided report specification. Returns result of a server-side streaming RPC. The result is returned in a sequence of responses.

tools.name: accounts.admobAccountsNetworkReportGenerate
tools.description: Generates an AdMob Network report based on the provided report specification. Returns result of a server-side streaming RPC. The result is returned in a sequence of responses.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
